message:
feat: enable Kitty text reporting for keyboard layout support

Enable Kitty keyboard protocol flag 16 (text reporting) which makes
the terminal send the actual produced character instead of base key
+ shift modifier. This properly handles shifted characters for any
keyboard layout (US, French, German, etc.) without needing a mapping
table.

- terminal.zig: Change flags from 9 to 25 (add flag 16)
- input.zig: Parse text field and use it when available
